name: Organic Volcanic Wheatgrass Juice Powder
description: Organic wheatgrass uses BioActive Dehydration™, an ambient temperature spray drying process that dries products to powder at less than 41°C, preserving the color, flavor, aroma and nutrients. Volcanic soil is loaded with essential minerals containing over 70+ trace minerals.
benefits: Rich in protein (contains all essential amino acids)

dosage.therapeutic: 1 teaspoon mixed with water (below 40°C), 1-2 times daily before meal
dosage.general: Mix with water below 40°C, preferably before meal

ingredients: Organic Wheatgrass Juice Powder (Liquadry Inc., Utah, USA)
who_can_consume: Adults and children seeking to increase chlorophyll intake, detox support, or general wellness.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have specific health conditions.

qa.question: What is the difference between juice powder and whole powder?
qa.answer: Juice powders differ from whole plant powders in that after grinding, the fibrous, pulpy plant materials are filtered out and discarded – leaving just the juice, which is then dehydrated into a powder. This makes it easier for the body to digest and assimilate nutrients.

qa.question: Why volcanic soil wheatgrass?
qa.answer: Volcanic soil is loaded with essential minerals that produce the most nutrient-dense crops. It contains over 70+ trace minerals that promote optimal growth and nutritional content of the green plants.
